title: tephrosia adunca var. acutifolia
intro: Tephrosia adunca var. acutifolia is a plant species native to certain regions, often referred to as a type of legume or pea family plant. The medicinal properties of Tephrosia adunca var. acutifolia are attributed to its alkaloid content, specifically the presence of rotenone, which is known for its insecticidal and antifungal properties. The plant has been traditionally used for its health benefits, including as an anti-inflammatory agent to treat various ailments such as fever and skin conditions. In terms of herbal preparations, Tephrosia adunca var. acutifolia can be made into teas, infusions, or extracts, often combined with other herbs for enhanced medicinal effects.
